name: code
description: Highlighted [source,ruby] + [source,js] blocks with source-highlighter: rouge. Rouge runs inside the wasm engine, so this is the lowest-risk fixture: it asserts the highlighted code text survives into the PDF text layer and is placed on the page. Pixel tolerance is loose because token colours are compared structurally, not per-pixel, against the reference build.

structural.note: Highlighting wraps tokens in colour but the literal characters remain in the text layer; parity is 'same code text, present and placed', not per-pixel token colour.
